description_long: This is a large, tracked combat tactical vehicle with a beige exterior and a prominent multiple-rocket launcher system mounted on its rear platform. The vehicle features a robust, armored hull with visible ventilation grilles, hatches, and various equipment mounted on the sides. The rocket launcher system consists of a rectangular pod with multiple circular launch tubes, angled upward for firing, and is supported by a rotating turret base. The vehicle runs on heavy-duty metal tracks, providing mobility over rough terrain, and has several access panels and observation ports on its body. The front of the vehicle is equipped with reinforced armor and utility fixtures, while the rear shows the full array of rocket tubes. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility, suitable for urban or battlefield deployment.
description: A beige, heavily armored tracked vehicle with a large multiple-rocket launcher system mounted on its rear platform, featuring numerous launch tubes and robust exterior details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the armored cab, ventilation grilles, and the base of the rocket launcher system.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the tracks, side hatches, and the angled rocket launcher pod with visible launch tubes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the rocket launcher pod with all launch tubes exposed and the rear armor plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the tracks, side details, and the rocket launcher system from a different angle.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large multiple-rocket launcher pod mounted on a rotating turret at the rear platform; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating covering the cab, sides, and rear; appears thick and robust with flat, reinforced panels and some sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid beige color; no visible camouflage pattern.
